  have h_le : ps[j] ≤ i := by
    apply not_of_lt_findIdx (· > i); rw [h_idx]; omega
  simp at h_le
  have h_step : ps[j+1] = ps[j] + L[j].length := by
    rw [getElem_succ_scanl] <;> simp [ps] <;> try omega
  have h_val : (L.take j).flatten.length = ps[j] := by
    simp [ps, getElem_partialSums, List.map_take]
    generalize L.take j = L'
    induction L' <;> simp [flatten_cons, *]
  rw [h_val, h_step] at *
  omega

by
  let S := (L.map length).partialSums
  have h₁ : S[j + 1] > i := by
    have : S.findIdx (· > i) < S.length := by simp [S, partialSums]; omega
    simpa [j] using getElem_findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) S this
  have h₂ : S[j + 1] = S[j] + L[j].length := by
    rw [getElem_succ_scanl (by simp [S, partialSums]; omega)]; simp [S, hj]
  have h₃ : S[j] = (L.take j).flatten.length := by
    rw [getElem_partialSums (by simp [S, partialSums]; omega), take_map, length_flatten]
  omega

by
  let ps := (L.map length).partialSums
  have hidx : j + 1 = ps.findIdx (· > i) := by
    rw [j, Nat.sub_add_cancel]
    by_contra h
    have : ps[0] > i := by
      have : ps.findIdx (· > i) = 0 := by omega
      have := ps.findIdx_getElem (i := 0) (by simp [this])
      simpa using this
    have : ps[0] = 0 := getElem_scanl_zero
    omega
  have hgt : ps[j+1] > i := by
    rw [hidx]
    have := ps.findIdx_getElem (i := j + 1) (by rw [← hidx]; simpa using hj)
    simpa using this
  have hle : ps[j] ≤ i := by
    rw [hidx]
    have := ps.findIdx_lower (i := j) (by exact Nat.lt_succ_self _)
    simpa using this
  have heq : ps[j+1] = ps[j] + L[j].length := by
    have : j < (L.map length).length := hj
    rw [getElem_succ_scanl (by simp [this])]
    simp [this]
  have hflat : (L.take j).flatten.length = ps[j] := by
    simp [getElem_partialSums, map_take, length_flatten]
  rw [hflat] at hle heq
  omega

by
  let ps := (L.map length).partialSums
  have hlen : j + 1 < ps.length := by simp [length_partialSums]; omega
  have h_idx : ps.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by
    have : ps.findIdx (· > i) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h0
      have : ps[0] > i := by
        rw [← h0]; apply List.getElem_findIdx; simp [length_partialSums]; omega
      simp [getElem_scanl_zero] at this
    simp [j]; omega
  have h_gt : ps[j+1] > i := by rw [← h_idx]; apply List.getElem_findIdx hlen
  have h_le : ps[j] ≤ i := by
    have := List.findIdx_min (l := ps) (p := (· > i)) (i := j)
    simp [← h_idx] at this; exact this (Nat.lt_succ_self _)
  have h_eq : ps[j] = (L.take j).flatten.length := by
    rw [getElem_partialSums (by omega)]
    induction j generalizing L <;> cases L <;> simp_all
  have h_step : ps[j+1] = ps[j] + L[j].length := by
    rw [getElem_succ_scanl (by omega)]; simp
  rw [h_eq] at h_le h_step; rw [h_step] at h_gt; omega

by
  let ps := (L.map length).partialSums
  have h_idx : ps.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by
    dsimp [j]
    have : ps[0] ≤ i := by simp
    have : ps.findIdx (· > i) ≠ 0 :=
      fun e => by have := getElem_findIdx (· > i) ps 0 (by simp [e]); simp at this; omega
    omega
  have h_gt : ps[j+1] > i := by
    rw [← h_idx]; apply getElem_findIdx
    rw [length_partialSums, length_map]; omega
  have h_le : ps[j] ≤ i := by
    rw [← h_idx]; have := findIdx_min (· > i) (xs := ps) (i := j) (by omega); simpa using this
  simp only [getElem_partialSums, List.length_flatten, List.take_map] at h_le h_gt
  rw [List.take_succ_getElem _ _ hj, List.flatten_append, List.length_append] at h_gt
  simp at h_gt
  omega

by
  let ps := (L.map length).partialSums
  have hps : ps.length = L.length + 1 := length_partialSums _ _
  have hidx : ps.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by
    simp [j]
    have : ps.findIdx (· > i) ≠ 0 := fun h0 => by
      have := getElem_findIdx (l := ps) (by rw [h0]; omega) h0
      simp [ps, getElem_partialSums] at this
      omega
    omega
  have h_gt : i < ps[j+1] := by
    rw [← hidx]
    exact getElem_findIdx (l := ps) (by rw [hidx]; omega) rfl
  have h_le : ps[j] ≤ i := by
    by_contra con
    have := List.findIdx_le (p := (· > i)) (l := ps) (i := j) (by omega) (by simpa using con)
    rw [hidx] at this; omega
  have h_eq : (L.take j).flatten.length = ps[j] := by
    simp [ps, getElem_partialSums, length_flatten, map_take]
  have h_step : ps[j+1] = ps[j] + L[j].length := by
    simp [ps, getElem_partialSums]
    rw [take_succ, map_append, sum_append]; simp
  rw [h_eq]
  rw [h_step] at h_gt
  omega

by
  let ps := (L.map length).partialSums
  have hidx : ps.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by dsimp [j]; omega
  have hgt : i < ps[j+1] := by
    rw [← hidx]; apply getElem_findIdx
    rw [hidx]; simp [ps, length_partialSums, hj]; omega
  have hle : ps[j] ≤ i := by
    apply le_of_not_gt; intro h
    have : ps.findIdx (· > i) ≤ j := List.findIdx_le (by simp [ps, length_partialSums, hj]; omega) h
    omega
  have heq : (L.take j).flatten.length = ps[j] := by
    simp [ps, length_flatten, map_take, getElem_partialSums _ (by omega)]
  have hstep : ps[j+1] = ps[j] + L[j].length := by
    simp [ps, partialSums, getElem_succ_scanl (by simp [length_scanl, hj]; omega), hj]
  omega

by
  let ps := (L.map length).partialSums
  have h_idx : ps.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by
    dsimp [j]
    split
    · next h =>
      have := getElem_findIdx (p := (· > i)) (l := ps) (by rw [h]; simp [ps])
      simp [h, ps] at this
    · omega
  have : ps[j + 1] > i := by
    rw [← h_idx]; apply getElem_findIdx; simp [ps, hj]
  have : ps[j] ≤ i := by
    have := not_of_lt_findIdx (p := (· > i)) (l := ps) (i := j) (by rw [h_idx]; omega)
    simpa using this
  have : ps[j+1] = ps[j] + L[j].length := by
    rw [getElem_succ_scanl (by simp [ps, hj])]; simp [hj]
  have : (L.take j).flatten.length = ps[j] := by
    rw [getElem_partialSums (by simp [ps, hj])]; simp [length_flatten, map_take]
  simp [k, this]; omega
